title: Spicy Crunchy Midnight Chickpea Crumble
description: A savory and crunchy Indian-inspired dish featuring poached chickpeas seasoned with red chili powder for a midnight craving that's dairy-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp coconut oil
ingredients.notes: or any other neutral-flavored cooking oil

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup water or low-sodium vegetable broth (optional)

instructions: In a large bowl, mix chickpeas with coconut oil, red chili powder, and optional water or vegetable broth. Stir in ground cumin, salt, and paprika.
Transfer mixture to an oven-safe dish or baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast in the preheated oven for about 20-25 minutes until golden brown and crispy on top.
Squeeze half a lime over the crumble just before serving to add some extra tanginess.
